betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6DU Plating§f:
DU Plating (nuclearcraft:part, metadata 2) is a Depleted-Uranium-reinforced composite plate used as radiation shielding and as the structural material for many of NC's higher-tier machines. It is one of the most-used parts in the entire NC tech tree.

§6Crafting Recipe (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:391)§f:
Pattern "SUS / UPU / SUS" in a 3×3 grid. Letters: S = dustSulfur, U = ingotUranium238, P = plateAdvanced. Yields 1 DU Plating. Sulfur and uranium surround an advanced-plate core, creating a dense radiation-absorbing composite.

§6Why DU Plating Matters§f:
DU Plating is the standard radiation shielding plate in NC. Depleted uranium has a high atomic mass and density, making it ideal for absorbing gamma rays and slowing neutrons. Combined with sulfur, it forms a stable alloy that is also mechanically robust.

§6Direct Descendants of DU Plating (TaskRetrieval)§f:
The graph shows 6 items crafted using this part:
- lithium_ion_battery_du (DU Lithium Ion Battery) — energy storage with radiation shielding
- solar_panel_du (DU Solar Panel) — passive RF generation from sunlight
- voltaic_pile_du (DU Voltaic Pile) — self-powered RF generator using radioactive decay
- rad_shielding:2 (Heavy Radiation Shielding) — multi-block radiation barrier
- part:3 (Elite Plating) — top-tier composite plate used in QMD machines
- qmd:irradiator (QMD Irradiator) — multi-block charged-particle irradiation chamber

§6Upstream Materials§f:
Crafting DU Plating consumes ingotUranium238 (or HBM's hbm:ingot_u238), dustSulfur (from Thermal/Native/HBM sources), and plateAdvanced. The Ingot Former and Alloy Furnace are convenient for bulk-producing the Uranium-238 ingot and Advanced Plating inputs.

§6Usage Tier (CraftingRecipeHandler.java:388-401)§f:
DU Plating sits at tier 2 of NC's plating progression. Basic (Pb+C) -> Advanced (Redstone+Tough+Basic) -> DU (Sulfur+U-238+Advanced) -> Elite (Crystal Binder+Boron+DU). DU Plating is the structural material for Elite Plating, which in turn is the chassis for QMD's Beamline and Vacuum Chamber components.

§eTip§f: Set up a dedicated Assembly Machine or NC Assembler line for DU Plating — it is consumed in large quantities by DU-tier batteries, solar panels, voltaic piles, and the QMD Irradiator.

§eTip§f: The QMD Irradiator (qmd:irradiator) is one of the most important QMD multiblock machines for charged-particle physics. It uses DU Plating in its frame to safely contain the beam-target interaction.

§eTip§f: To mass-produce DU Plating ingredients, run the QMD Target Chamber with a high-energy proton beam on a Uranium-238 target to enrich it, or use the NC Isotope Separator to split natural uranium into U-235 and U-238 streams.

§cWarning§f: Carrying stacks of DU Plating in your inventory exposes you to low-level background radiation. Use a backpack with radiation shielding or leave the crafting output in a chest.
